description_long: This object is a rugged, irregularly shaped piece of bread, resembling a rustic artisan loaf fragment. Its surface is rough and uneven, with a dark, almost charred-looking crust that transitions into a lighter, porous interior. The texture is highly detailed, showing pitted and bubbled areas typical of a well-baked, crusty bread. The coloration ranges from deep brown and blue-black on the crust to a muted grayish-tan on the exposed interior. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring, giving it a natural, hand-torn appearance. The bread looks dense and hearty, as if it was broken from a larger loaf.
description: A rugged, hand-torn piece of rustic bread with a dark, rough crust and a porous, lighter interior. The surface is uneven and pitted, showing natural baking textures.
description_view_0: The bread is seen from an angle highlighting its jagged, dark crust and the transition to a lighter, porous interior.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the rough, pitted surface and the thickness of the bread, with the crust appearing darker and more prominent.
description_view_2: The top-down view reveals the broad, uneven surface of the bread's interior, showing its porous, bubbled texture.
description_view_3: This view shows the bread from a corner, accentuating the contrast between the dark crust and the lighter, rough interior.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is dark, thick, and rugged, with a natural, uneven texture and no visible scoring or flour dusting. Its surface appears pitted and slightly charred, giving it a rustic, hand-torn look.
